data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_SavingMyProgress: I want to take a rest, so I'm saving my\nprogress.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_IWorkAtPokemonMart: Hi!\nI work at a POKéMON MART.\pCan I get you to come with me?
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_ThisIsAPokemonMart:
This is a POKéMON MART.
Just look for our blue roof.\pWe sell a variety of goods including
POKé BALLS for catching POKéMON.\pHere, I'd like you to have this as a
promotional item.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_PotionExplanation: A POTION can be used anytime, so it's\neven more useful than a POKéMON CENTER\lin certain situations.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_WaitDontComeInHere:
Aaaaah! Wait!
Please don't come in here.\pI just discovered the footprints of
a rare POKéMON!\pWait until I finish sketching
them, okay?
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_DiscoveredFootprints: I just discovered the footprints of\na rare POKéMON!\pWait until I finish sketching\nthem, okay?
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_FinishedSketchingFootpri: I finished sketching the footprints of\na rare POKéMON.\pBut it turns out they were only my\nown footprints...
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_BrendanLetsGoBack: BRENDAN: I'm heading back to my dad's\nLAB now.\l{PLAYER}, you should hustle back, too.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_TownSign: OLDALE TOWN\n“Where things start off scarce.”
